name: Rich Devil's Food Layer Cake & Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour two round 9-inch cake pans.
3. Melt chocolate and 1/2 cup water in the top of a double boiler until cool.
4. Cream butter, sugar, and brown sugar together until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
5. Add vanilla and eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in melted chocolate and mix well.
7. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together; add to batter alternating with milk, stirring just until blended.
8. Bake cakes for 30-35 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean. Let cool on racks.
9. Turn out the layers and allow to cool while preparing frosting.
10. Frosting: Melt chocolate over hot water, then let cool.
11. Place egg whites, sugar, cream of tartar, cold water, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
12. Beat with an electric mixer for 1 minute; place pan over steaming water (but not boiling) and continue beating until mixture is very thick and fluffy, about 7 minutes.
13. Turn off heat and fold in vanilla and melted chocolate by hand.
14. Place one cake layer on your serving dish and coat with frosting.
15. Place the second layer on top and frost the sides of the cake as well.
